actuator_limit_validation: runtime readback; saturation enforcement is not tested
physics_step_validation: readback after every discrete physics step in the measured phases; solver-internal substeps and hard-stop enforcement are not tested
stepping_mode: playing timeline without application updates; SimulationManager.step(steps=1, update_fabric=True)
position_limit_validation: all discrete physics-step readbacks advanced by this smoke remain in range
